title: Keir Starmer: 'I'm fed up' with Trump and Putin affecting UK energy costs
summary_full: Iran has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz in the war with the U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.
summary_public: Iran has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz in the war with the U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.
